title: How do I configure my BackMarket account with SellBrite?
bodyHtml:
Authorization

To get the integration working correctly, you will need to find the following Tokens.

  • Back Market Token,
  • ShipStation API Key & API Secret
  • SellBrite Account Token & Secret Key


Back Market Token

To make sure we can update your quantity and prices on BackMarket using REST API, you need to locate your Back Marker Token.

Here are the steps to find it:

→ Go on your Back Market Back Office 

→ Go on the Options tab > Integrations

→ Enter your password and get your token


ShipStation Token

To make sure we can push regular 15 minutes updates on your ShipStation account, we need your ShipStation token.

There are 2 API Tokens: “API Key” & “API Secret”

Here are the steps: 

  • Go to the settings > Account > API Settings (URL ending with shipstation.com/#/settings/api) 

SellBrite Token

To make sure we can update your quantity and prices on SellBrite using REST API.

Here are the steps:

→ Go on your SellBrite app. 

→ Click on Support.

→ Click on API.

If you have multiple warehouses, please provide us the warehouse name that you want to use to update inventories.


How to communicate those Tokens?

You can go on the following Website: https://www.saltify.io/en/ and scroll down to write your information in the text fields: 

Paste the following text: 

  • Back Market Token: 
  • ShipStation API Key: 
  • ShipStation API Secret: 
  • SellBrite Account Token: 
  • SellBrite Secret Key: 
  • SellBrite warehouse name (optional):

Provide us the link and the “passphrase” if you set one, and we would then encrypt and save your values in our Database to start the connection.

In the near future, you will have an interface in your Back Office to provide us with those information without the struggle of this last part...

Thanks for your patience!
